zh.lifeSummary: King William DUPLICATE AND CORRUPT FILE the Lion of Scotland於1143年12月24日出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安哈丁頓。他與Concubine of William Scotland I結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1214年12月4日在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林享年70歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭安格斯阿布洛阿斯。

nameMeanings.name: AND
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French Canadian Hénault or directly of French Hunault (see Henault 2).
Catalan (Añó): Castilianized form of Anyó, probably from the old personal name Annone.

variants.name: Anno
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Masayuki, Tadashi, Yoshito.
Japanese: written 安野 ‘peaceful plain’. This surname is rare in Japan proper, and may have originated in the Ryūkyū Islands, where it is pronounced   Ano  .

variants.name: Henault
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Emile, Lucien, Martial, Pierre, Camille, Fernand, Laurier, Monique, Normand, Philippe.
French (Hénault): from the ancient Germanic personal name Haginwald, composed of the elements hagin ‘enclosure, protected place’ and wald ‘power, authority’.
Altered form (Hénault) of French Hunault: from the ancient Germanic personal name Hunwald, composed of the elements hun ‘bear cub’ and wald ‘power, authority’. Compare Ano and Eno .

nameMeanings.name: FILE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German   Feil   or   Pfeil  .
Hungarian: from a variant of Füle, a pet form of the personal name Fülöp, Hungarian form of Philip .

variants.name: Feil
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Guenther, Kurt, Otto, Reinhardt, Bernhard, Helmut, Walburga, Wilhelm.
from Middle High German vīol ‘violet’, presumably applied as a nickname; this surname occurs mostly in southern Germany.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: King William DUPLICATE AND CORRUPT FILE the Lion of Scotland was born on 24 December 1143, in Haddington, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. He married Concubine of William Scotland I. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 4 December 1214, in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Arbroath, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: King William DUPLICATE AND CORRUPT FILE the Lion of Scotland est né le 24 décembre 1143, à Haddington, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Concubine of William Scotland I. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 décembre 1214, à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Arbroath, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: King William DUPLICATE AND CORRUPT FILE the Lion of Scotland(은)는 1143년 12월 24일 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 하딩턴에서 태어났다. 그는 Concubine of William Scotland I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1214년 12월 4일 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 아브로스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: King William DUPLICATE AND CORRUPT FILE the Lion of Scotland nasceu em 24 de dezembro de 1143, em Haddington, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Concubine of William Scotland I. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 4 de dezembro de 1214, em Stirling, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Arbroath, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: King William DUPLICATE AND CORRUPT FILE the Lion of Scotland родился 24 декабря 1143 г. в местности хаддингтон, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Concubine of William Scotland I. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 4 декабря 1214 г. в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности арброат, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания.
